canonical_answer: A man wearing a blue and white cycling jersey and purple gloves stands in a workshop next to a grey mountain bike mounted on a black repair stand. A white bicycle helmet rests on a wooden workbench behind the bike, near various tools and bottles. The background features a grey metal roll-up garage door and a window with white frames.

question: Describe the visual sequence of scenes and objects shown from the start of the video until the mechanic begins working.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a black tool case with silver wrenches lies on bricks; at 2s, a title card appears over a blurred outdoor scene; at 6s, a man in a blue jersey stands by a bike on a stand; at 16s, gloved hands rotate a small metallic part; at 18s, a hex key is inserted into a bolt on the bike.

question: Describe the specific actions performed by the mechanic and the tools used during the workshop segments.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a man in a blue jersey stands next to a grey mountain bike; at 10s, the man wears purple gloves while standing near the workbench; at 16s, hands in purple and black gloves rotate a ridged metallic object; at 18s, a hex key is inserted into a bolt held by a gloved hand near the Giant frame.
